plan_predates_engineering_evidence: This plan was authored on 2026-07-24, immediately after selection and before any Next.js files were written. The engineering stage has not started at time of this plan's creation.

tech_stack.styling: Tailwind CSS with Tableau token system
tech_stack.data: packages/commerce-core (local localStorage, no external DB or real payment)
tech_stack.fonts: DM Serif Display (headings) + DM Sans (body) via next/font
tech_stack.deployment: local dev only (next dev); no production deployment

non_claims_from_checklist: Synthetic cohort only — these KPIs do not prove real demand, real conversion, or real financial performance.
Does not prove real payment processing, PCI scope, or real settlement.
Does not prove real rights to any artwork — all catalog items are fictional synthetic designs.
Does not prove GDPR/CCPA compliance or real consent management.
Does not prove real email delivery — transactional email templates are designed but not sent.
Does not prove SEO ranking or real organic traffic.

tasks.description: Initialise Next.js 15 project with TypeScript, Tailwind, and App Router
acceptance_criteria: AC1: `npm run build` exits 0
AC2: `next dev` starts without errors on localhost:3000
AC3: No hard-coded hex colours in any component — tokens only

tasks.description: Implement Tableau token system (sage green accent, DM Serif Display + DM Sans, artwork-label caption device)
acceptance_criteria: AC4: Token file defines --accent-sage (#4A7C59), --font-heading (DM Serif Display), --font-body (DM Sans), neutral scale
AC5: check-contrast.mjs passes against pairs manifest with all text pairs ≥ 4.5:1 AA
AC6: Fonts load via next/font, not external CDN (public-safe)

tasks.description: Build catalog routes: homepage (featured + browse), collection page, poster detail page
acceptance_criteria: AC7: Homepage shows featured posters and at least one collection section
AC8: Poster detail page shows: preview thumbnail (generated placeholder, no external asset), artist credit, format selector (A4/A3/Letter), price, 'Add to collection' CTA
AC9: Empty/not-found state for invalid poster ID
AC10: All routes keyboard-reachable

tasks.description: Build cart: add/remove, format variant, empty-cart state, promo entry, mini-cart with aria-live count
acceptance_criteria: AC11: Cart persists to localStorage across page reload
AC12: Empty-cart state shows a non-empty prompt (not a blank screen)
AC13: Promo code FIRST15 applies 15% discount; invalid code shows inline error (not an alert box)
AC14: Mini-cart count shows correct singular ('1 item') vs plural ('2 items') aria-label

tasks.description: Build checkout: guest (email only), synthetic payment, order review, failure states
acceptance_criteria: AC15: Checkout does not require account registration
AC16: Email field present with proper autocomplete attribute
AC17: PaymentForm declines card ending 0002 with inline error (aria-invalid on the field, no page reload)
AC18: Accepted card shows order confirmation page with simulated download button
AC19: Terms acceptance required before payment can be submitted

tasks.description: Build order lifecycle: placed → download_ready state machine, confirmation page, 30-min cancellation window
acceptance_criteria: AC20: Order confirmation page shows: order ID, poster title, format, price, download button (PDF placeholder)
AC21: Cancel order within 30 minutes if download not accessed — order moves to 'cancelled' state
AC22: Cancel button hidden/disabled after 30-minute window
AC23: Order state copy is locked (same text for each state — cannot be re-worded per-order)

tasks.description: Build policy pages: terms, refund policy, privacy policy (static pages linked from footer)
acceptance_criteria: AC24: /terms, /refund, /privacy routes all return 200 with content
AC25: All three linked from footer on every page
AC26: /contact route returns 200 with contact information or form (non-functional form is acceptable, clearly labelled)

tasks.description: Accessibility — pass QA-readiness checklist before submitting to impeccable
acceptance_criteria: AC27: No heading-level skips (h1→h2→h3, never h1→h3) on any route
AC28: One role='status' live region for cart count — not competing live regions
AC29: All icon-only controls have accessible names
AC30: aria-invalid on all form fields in error state
AC31: All interactive elements have visible focus indicator

tasks.description: Add JSON-LD (Product schema), meta tags, OG cards for SEO
acceptance_criteria: AC32: Product detail pages have Product JSON-LD with name, price, currency
AC33: All pages have title and description meta tags
AC34: OG image/card present on detail pages

tasks.description: Golden-path walkthrough on dev server before QA
acceptance_criteria: AC35: Walk all 9 steps of the primary user journey on a running dev server — confirm each step is reachable and keyboard-operable
AC36: Walk the declined-card edge case (card ending 0002) — confirm error state is visible and recoverable

owner_gate_stops_carried_forward: Real gateway/processor — OWNER_GATE; not in scope for this lifecycle run
engineering_required_stops_carried_forwa: Webhook signature verification — ENG; no real payment events
CDN caching strategy — ENG; deployment scope

hard_gate_result.criteria_checkable_by_someone_else: PASSED — every AC is a binary check (route returns 200, aria-label correct singular/plural, card declines with visible error). No AC requires subjective judgement to verify.
hard_gate_result.plan_predates_engineering: PASSED — plan written before any Next.js files exist. Timestamp: 2026-07-24.
hard_gate_result.non_claims_carried_through: PASSED — all NONCLAIM items from COMMERCE-CHECKLIST are in non_claims_from_checklist and will be in lifecycle-state.json non_claims.

rubric_score: estimated 15/16 (93.75%) — strong AC coverage; minor gap on not having explicit framework-version verification (plan assumes Next.js 15; actual package.json will confirm)
